title.purpose: Section headings within a page. Use sparingly.

body.purpose: All content — table rows, card descriptions, form labels.

label.purpose: Column headers and section dividers. Uppercase, tracked.

mono.purpose: All currency values and financial metrics. Tabular numerals.

shadows.name: none
shadows.purpose: The default. This system is flat — no shadows on cards, panels, or modals at rest.

shadows.name: float
shadows.purpose: Strict floating only: dropdowns, tooltips, combobox panels. Not decorative.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: State transitions — button hover, nav active, color changes. 150ms.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main action. Used for Add Account, Save, Import — wherever a single forward step is needed.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 256 256" fill="currentColor" style="margin-right:6px"><path d="M224,128a8,8,0,0,1-8,8H136v80a8,8,0,0,1-16,0V136H40a8,8,0,0,1,0-16h80V40a8,8,0,0,1,16,0v80h80A8,8,0,0,1,224,128Z"/></svg>Add Account</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: oklch(69.6% 0.17 162.48); color: #ffffff; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 6px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(59.6% 0.145 163.225); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(69.6% 0.17 162.48 / 0.25); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary and destructive actions — Edit, Archive, and dropdown triggers within table rows.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; background: transparent; color: oklch(37.8% 0.015 216); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; padding: 6px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 4px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), color 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(96.3% 0.002 197.1); color: oklch(21.8% 0.008 223.9); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid oklch(69.6% 0.17 162.48 / 0.25); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: The signature component. Shows a single labeled financial metric — FIRE number, net worth, savings rate.
components.html:
FIRE Number
$1,250,000
Based on 25× annual expenses
components.css: .ds-stat-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid oklch(92.5% 0.005 214.3); border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; } .ds-stat-label { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(56% 0.021 213.5); margin-bottom: 4px; } .ds-stat-value { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(21.8% 0.008 223.9); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-stat-hint { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(56% 0.021 213.5); margin-top: 4px; }

components.name: Navigation Item
components.description: Sidebar navigation link. 8 items covering Dashboard through Settings.
components.css: .ds-sidebar { background: #ffffff; border-right: 1px solid oklch(92.5% 0.005 214.3); padding: 12px; width: 224px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 4px; font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: oklch(37.8% 0.015 216); text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(96.3% 0.002 197.1); } .ds-nav-active { background: oklch(96.3% 0.002 197.1); color: oklch(21.8% 0.008 223.9); font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Table Row
components.description: Account list row. Grid layout with account name/institution, type, right-aligned monospaced balance, and an action menu trigger.
components.html:
AccountTypeBalance
Vanguard Roth IRA
Vanguard
Roth IRA$84,320
Fidelity 401(k)
401(k)$143,100
components.css: .ds-table { border: 1px solid oklch(92.5% 0.005 214.3); border-radius: 8px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-table-header { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 160px 140px 36px; background: oklch(96.3% 0.002 197.1); padding: 8px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(92.5% 0.005 214.3); font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: oklch(56% 0.021 213.5); } .ds-table-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 160px 140px 36px; align-items: center; padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(92.5% 0.005 214.3); background: #ffffff; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms; } .ds-table-row:hover { background: oklch(96.3% 0.002 197.1); } .ds-table-row-last { border-bottom: none; } .ds-row-name { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(21.8% 0.008 223.9); } .ds-row-sub { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; color: oklch(56% 0.021 213.5); } .ds-row-type { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(56% 0.021 213.5); } .ds-row-balance { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(21.8% 0.008 223.9); text-align: right; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-row-action { background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; color: oklch(56% 0.021 213.5); padding: 4px; border-radius: 4px; font-size: 1rem; } .ds-row-action:hover { background: oklch(92.5% 0.005 214.3); } .ds-col-right { text-align: right; }

narrative.overview:
TrackMyFI is designed for people who measure time in decades, not quarters. The interface reflects this posture: calm, unhurried, precise. Every pixel on screen exists to help a person understand where they stand on a journey that might take twenty years. That requires restraint. Numbers carry the weight; decoration doesn't.

The system uses a cool mist neutral as its canvas — a blue-tinged gray that reads as the quiet of early morning, before the noise of the day starts. Emerald is the single voice of progress: sparing, earned, only there when something matters. Dark mode inverts the atmosphere to a deep mist-navy, the same quality but nocturnal — like checking your numbers late at night by lamplight.

This system explicitly rejects the spreadsheet aesthetic. It rejects gamified personal finance dashboards. It rejects corporate fintech. The design should feel like a tool someone made for themselves and uses every day.
keyCharacteristics: Flat tonal surfaces — depth through layering, never shadows
Emerald as a single earned accent, used sparingly
Monospaced currency values — precision is part of the identity
Compact but not cramped: 14px body, 12px labels, generous line height
Warm but not soft: slight warmth from the emerald accent, cool canvas beneath

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Emerald is the only accent color in the system. Used for primary buttons, active nav items, progress, and success — and nowhere else. When everything is green, nothing matters.

rules.name: The Cool Canvas Rule
rules.body: Page backgrounds are white or cool-tinted mist. Never warm-tinted. Warmth comes from emerald and spacing rhythm, not from tinting the canvas.

rules.name: The Mono-Numbers Rule
rules.body: Every currency value, percentage, and financial metric is rendered in font-mono with tabular-nums. Numbers that don't align are untrustworthy. This is not optional.

rules.name: The Label Ceiling Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked labels are used only for column headers and section dividers — not as eyebrows above every section. One or two per screen maximum.

rules.name: The Flat-First Rule
rules.body: No box shadows on cards, panels, or modals at rest. Separation comes from tonal background or a border. Shadows are never decorative.

dos: Do use font-mono with tabular numbers for every currency value and financial metric.
Do use emerald only for primary buttons, active states, progress, and success signals.
Do use tonal layering (bg → bg-elevated → bg-accented) to create depth.
Do give page titles the full display weight (24px/700).
Do use uppercase tracked labels only for table column headers and section dividers.
Do keep the sidebar simple and static.
donts: Don't build dense tabular interfaces that look like Excel reskinned.
Don't use shadows on cards, modals, or panels at rest.
Don't add color-coded everything across every row — color should be signal, not decoration.
Don't use gradient text, glassmorphism, or gradient backgrounds.
Don't put emerald on secondary or tertiary elements.
Don't use border-left as a colored accent stripe on cards or list items.
Don't make the design noisy with too many competing states and animations.
